acceptance_criteria_verified: AC-1: convex/transcripts/queries.ts created with getTranscript export
AC-2: convex/transcripts/mutations.ts created with 3 mutation exports
AC-3: getTranscript returns transcript with previewText for existing contentId
AC-4: getTranscript returns null for non-existent contentId
AC-5: createTranscriptJob returns existing job ID (idempotent)
AC-6: createTranscriptJob creates new job with status 'pending'
AC-7: updateJobStatus updates job status and sets timestamps
AC-8: markFailed sets status to 'failed' with errorMessage
patterns_followed: Idempotent job creation pattern (check existing, return if found, create if not)
Internal mutations for job management (not public)
Consistent types using v.union() for status fields
Edge case handling (null returns, terminal status checks)
